subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Covenant! His Honour Yusuf Khan hath arrived and today hath set forth for America. God willing, may he be assisted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده میثاق جناب یوسفخان وارد و الیوم عازم امریکا گشت انشاء الله موید و
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
